column1: # - name: friendly label used in logs and the summary table
# - host: IP address or hostname reachable via SSH from this machine
# - device: target block device on the remote Pi
# - post_restore_script: local path to a post-restore script for this Pi (optional)
# Classroom Pis — all get the same base image + classroom post-restore
# Office Pi — different date + different post-restore (different CF tunnel / hostname)
